'''Bufus Ritsomas''' was, until just before the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of [[Till Chorios]] and the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], he—along with fellow senators [[Tikkes/Legends|Tikkes]], [[Danry Ledwellow/Legends|Danry Ledwellow]], and [[Wuja Wojaine]]—was arrested on charges of using their positions to lead a [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]] ring in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="Holonet" />

{{Char-stub}}
